_doc: RBOR v1 (KM-R7 simplified): Rigid Bottleneck only, no offline relaxation/sleep yet. Top 10% of valid byte positions selected by B_p = stopgrad(KL_p * teacher_conf_p). Forward-KL + SF margin + SF floor losses ALL gated to selected positions. Resumes from r2 best.pt (same as SF). If RBOR-RB shows >= 0.02 BPB improvement vs b_star, layer in replay/sleep cycle for v2.

_b_star_from_r2.note: SF r1 was killed at step 600 with BPB 1.443 > 1.424 threshold. Best SF eval (1.411) ≈ b_star. SF was marginal as KM-R6 predicted. Per KM-R7, escalate to RBOR.

_notes.loss: L = L_CE + 0.05 * mean_{p in top-10% by B_p}(KL_p) + 0.01 * mean_{...}(margin_p) + 0.01 * mean_{...}(floor_p). RBOR gates everything to ~10% selected positions.
_notes.v1_simplifications: (a) B_p uses just KL*teacher_conf, dropping the CE_p factor in KM-R7 spec (KL subsumes most of the 'student wrong' signal). (b) No replay buffer or sleep cycle yet — that's RBOR v2 if v1 shows >=0.02 improvement.
_notes.kill_rules_interpretation: Same absolute steps and thresholds as SF r1: 500 > 1.424, 800 > 1.414, 1100 > 1.399.
_notes.success_criterion: Decisive bar from KM-R7: <=1.30 eval BPB by absolute step 1100. Marginal-but-meaningful: <=1.389 (b_star - 0.020). Failure: kill rules trigger or final eval > 1.389.
_notes.next_pivot_if_fails: Student Self-Predictor + TMR Sleep (meta-synthesis §5.3) — the next mechanism per KM-R7 failure mode.
